titleStmt.title: SII 30.59: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 59. (A.R. No. 136 of 1915.) Guḍimaṅgalam, Udumalpet Taluk, Coimbatore District On a stone set up in a field near the same village. Achyutarāya Mahārāya: Śakā 1458, Durmukhi, Arpaśi, 27, Dvādaśi, Wednesday, Uttara: 1536 A.D. Wed. Oct. 11

summary.p: Records the gift of the village Pūlaippāḍikkālpaḷḷi alias Periyamaṅgalam in South Poṅgalūṟkā-nāḍu to a brāhmaṇa choultry of that place, by the Mahāmaṇḍalīśvara Vālaiyadēvamahārāsar, for the merit of the Vijayanagara king Vīrapratāpa Vīra Acyutarāya Mahārāya. Among the boundaries a piece of land owned by Nāchchiyappa Nayiṉār's is mentioned. This record also states that the brāhmaṇa who was supervising the choultry was also entitled to enjoy the property.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vicaiyābhutaya cālivākaṉa cakāttam §
1000 4 100 5 10 8 ṉmel cellāniṉṟa tuṉ
muki Aṟpaci mātam 2 10 7 tuvāteciyum puta
vāramum Uttira nakṣattiramum peṟṟa ṉāḷ śrī
maṉ rācātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ śrī virappi
ṟatāpa śrīvira Accu(t)tarāya makārāyar piṟutu
vi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa kālattu An
ta Accutarāya makārāyaṟkku tekṣiṇāpuy(ā) teṇ
ṭamāṉa kāveri vallapaṉ kaṭakacūṟaikkā
ṟaṉ virutaṉ vāyavanti virutukajāciṅkaṉ pe
kketturacul Okkettukaṇṭaṉ maṇṭali
kamakalarācaṉ Uṟaiyūṟ puravarāticuraṉ poṉṉā
mpalanātaRead- poṉṉampala śrī pātacekara kācipa kottirat
tu Āpastatampa cūttirattu cūriya vaṅkiṣattil co
ḻakula Oṅkac ceṉṉaiya tevamakārācāviṉ pu
ttirarāṉa śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalecura vālaiyatevamakā
rācar nammuṭaiya cuvāmi Accu(t)tarāya makārāyaṟkku pu
ṇṇiyamāka teṉpoṅkalūṟkā nāṭṭup pūḷai
ypāṭikkālpaḷḷiyāṉa periyamaṅkalam nammuṭai
ya cuvāmi Accu(t)tarāyaṟku puṇṇiyamāka pirāma
ṇar cattirattukku laṭṣimi nārāyaṇa piṟitiyāka tu
vāteci puṇṇiya kālattil cayiraṇṇiya Utakamā
ka tānam taārāpūṟuvamāka caṟuvamāṉiyamākak ku
ṭukkaiyil Inta pirāmaṇa cattirattu periyama
ṅkalattu ṉāṟpāṅkellaikku viparam kiḻpā
ṅku Ellai Uṭaiyār koyil kuḷatteri va
ṭakiḻai mulai tāṉtoṉṟikku vaḻikku meṟku
nācciyappa nayiṉāṉ kāṭṭukku vaṭakku naṭṭa vāma
ṉa muttiraikkallu teṉmelai mulaikku El
lai cuṅkāri muṭakkuk karaiyil Oṟṟaippuḷiyi
l naṭṭa vāmaṉa muttiraikkallu vaṭamelai mūlai
kku Ellai tummurevukku kiḻakku koṇṭaṉ
paṭṭi Ellaikku teṟku naṭṭa vāmaṉa muttiraik
kallu vaṭakiḻai mulaikku Ellai pūḷaippā
ṭi vaḻikku meṟku piḷḷaiyāṇṭāṉ kuṭṭai
kku teṟku naṭṭa vāmaṉa muttirai kallu Inta ṉā
ṟpāṅkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai
toṭṭam toṭukai māvaṭai maravaṭai cāṟaṭai
ṭamakkam makimai kattikāvili puṟakūli pu
cu vaṉṟātāyam niti nikṣepam (c)ela taru pāṣā
kṣaṇi Ākāmi cittacāttiyam mutalāṉa maṟ
ṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cakala cuvāmiyaṅkaḷum peri
yamaṅkalattil pirāmaṇa cattirattukku naṭantu va
rakkaṭavatākavum Inta taṉmam cantirātittavaraiyum
cellak kaṭavatākavum Eṉṟu śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭa
lecura vālaiyateva makārācar nammuṭaiya cuvā
mi Accu(t)tarāyaṟkup puṇṇiyamāka pirāmaṇa
cattirattukku vaitta teṉpoṅkalūṟkā
nāṭṭup periyamaṅkalattup pirāmaṇa catti
rattu taṉmam cātaṉam Inta cattirattai pirāma
ṇaril Ārākilum naṉṟāka naṭatti vantāṉRead- vantālA
nta pirāmaṇaṉe Intak kiṟāmattaiyum Aṉu
pavittu koṇṭu Inta pirāmaṇa cattirattaiyum
naṉṟāka naṭatti koṇṭu varakkaṭavāṉākavum
Intat taṉmattukku yātoruvar Akitam paṇ
ṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kapilai
ppacuvaiyum pirāmaṇaraiyum mātāpitāvai
yum kurukkaḷaiyum koṉṟa pāvattile po
kakkaṭavarākavum svadattātḍviguṇam puṇyam para
dattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa suvattaniṣu
phalam bhavet . dānapālanayormaḍye dānāśre
yonu pālanam . dānāt svarga mavāpnoti pāla
nādacyutam vadam . śubhamastu .
pūviriyuṅ kāvuṟai teṉ poṅkalūṟkā nāṭa
ntāmaṉṉiṉaiyān teṉṉuṭaiya ṉa
Aruḷāl maṟaiyoṟkaṉṉami ṅ
kaṇṭāṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 30.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
